ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist who performed the track */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the track was released */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the track (0-100) */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track (0-1) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track (0-1) */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track (0-11, where 0=C, 1=C#, 2=D, etc.) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track in dB */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (0=minor, 1=major) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track (0-1) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track (0-1) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track (0-1) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track (0-1) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track (0-1) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in BPM */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code */,
  "album_track_number" INTEGER /* Track's position in the album */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been played */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the track has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the track has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Primary genre of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's profile image */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the artist joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist who performed the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album cover art */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the album has been played */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the album has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the album has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the playlist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the playlist image */,
  "owner_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "privacy_status" TEXT /* Privacy status of the playlist (public, private) */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the playlist has been played */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the playlist has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the playlist has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., play, like, skip) */,
  "play_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the play interaction in milliseconds */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the interaction (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during the interaction */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context of the interaction (e.g., search, recommendation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Subscription status of the user (free, premium) */,
  "listening_history" TEXT /* User's listening history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playlists" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* ID of the playlist */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the user subscribed to the playlist */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has played the playlist */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has liked the playlist */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date the user last played the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)
